# Demos

During the pandemic Alex and Jon recorded a number of videos in place of the practical component for their third 
year optional module 'How to Do Cognitive Neuroscience' - these are below and hopefully helpful to someone. 

## EEG Demo
{{< video https://youtu.be/zOBRdviUDdQ >}}

## Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation Demo
{{< video https://youtu.be/gF87592DfTM >}}

## Transcranial Electrical Stimulation Demo
{{< video https://youtu.be/7w_mkKv79as >}}


# Talks
<iframe width="1024" height="576" src="https://media.ccc.de/v/emf2026-79-1-stimulating-brains-without-touching-them-a-story-of-magnets/oembed" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
